message:
test: add text-based screenshot capture test for visual evidence (2dccg.7.1)

Generates 8 deterministic text captures (dark/light theme, 3 density
modes, help overlay, wide/narrow terminal, SimpleBorders degradation)
to test-results/screenshots/ with MANIFEST.md. These serve as
auditable visual evidence of ftui rendering quality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
